title: ferray-core: no scalar-array arithmetic (array + scalar)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy allows: arr + 5, arr * 2.0, arr ** 3 — scalar operands are broadcast to the array shape implicitly. ferray-core's operator overloads only accept Array op Array. There are no impls for Array<T,D> + T or T + Array<T,D>. Users must construct a scalar array or use mapv(|x| x + 5.0). This is a major ergonomic gap. Add operator impls where one operand is a scalar T: Element, using mapv internally for same-shape efficiency.
